description: This video provides a comprehensive guide on Binance P2P trading, covering how to buy and sell cryptocurrencies, post trade ads, and handle disputes. It features insights from the Binance P2P team, including a demonstration of the trading process on the app and web.
topic_summary: A 360 introduction to Binance P2P, discussing buying/selling cryptocurrencies, posting ads, and handling disputes. The session includes a demo of the trading process on Binance's platform [t=22:48].
